semantic.role: Core TypeScript interface and utility functions defining the contract and operations for accessing and mutating supported configuration values in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the type-safe interface for retrieving all user-configurable system parameters.
Provides getter methods for configuration options such as LLM settings, validation policies, hook modes, artifact strategies, and git management flags.
Exposes setter methods (via the interface and the setSupportedValue function) for modifying configuration values.
Centralizes config access and mutation logic in the getSupportedValue and setSupportedValue functions, mapping each SupportedConfigKey to the appropriate accessor methods.
outOfScope: Does not implement actual configuration storage or retrieval.
Does not handle configuration file parsing or environment variable reading.
invariants: The interface must be implemented by configuration provider classes that supply live values.
The getSupportedValue and setSupportedValue functions must only use methods defined on ConfigSupportedValueAccess.
No direct access to configuration files, environment variables, or external systems is performed here.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a stable contract and utility layer for config value access and mutation, enabling consistent configuration handling across the ArchSpine system.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Support the v1.0.0 architectural governance and semantic layer by providing a well-typed, centralized configuration access surface ahead of AI-era orchestration.

semantic.driftReason: Previous semantic description only covered the interface, but the file now also exports two operational functions (getSupportedValue, setSupportedValue) that use the accessor contract.

English.role: Core interface and utility functions that define the contract and operations for accessing and mutating supported configuration values in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the type-safe interface for retrieving all user-configurable system parameters.
Provides getter methods for configuration options such as LLM settings, validation policies, hook modes, artifact strategies, and git management flags.
Exposes setter methods (via the interface and the setSupportedValue function) for modifying configuration values.
Centralizes config access and mutation logic in the getSupportedValue and setSupportedValue functions, mapping each SupportedConfigKey to the appropriate accessor methods.
outOfScope: Does not implement actual configuration storage or retrieval.
Does not handle configuration file parsing or environment variable reading.

Simplified Chinese.role: 定义和实现访问与修改系统支持配置值的核心接口和工具函数，为 ArchSpine 系统提供类型安全的配置访问契约。
responsibilities: 定义类型安全的接口，用于获取所有用户可配置的系统参数。
提供针对 LLM 设置、验证策略、钩子模式、工件策略和 Git 管理标志等配置选项的 getter 方法。
通过接口和 setSupportedValue 函数暴露 setter 方法，以修改配置值。
将 getSupportedValue 和 setSupportedValue 函数集中化，将每个 SupportedConfigKey 映射到对应的访问器方法。
outOfScope: 不实现实际的配置存储或检索。
不处理配置文件解析或环境变量读取。

exports.name: setSupportedValue
exports.signature:
setSupportedValue(
  access: ConfigSupportedValueAccess,
  key: SupportedConfigKey,
  value: unknown,
)
